seoTitle: Oxley Island vs Oxley Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Oxley Island and Oxley Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Oxley Island vs Oxley Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oxley Island and Oxley Park.
heading: Oxley Island vs Oxley Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oxley Island, New South Wales and Oxley Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oxley Island has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Oxley Park (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oxley Island or Oxley Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oxley Island has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Oxley Park scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oxley Island scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Oxley Park scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oxley Island or Oxley Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oxley Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
